name: charly-internals
description: Development internals for charly contributors — Go source map, generate-source, install-plan IR, capabilities/OCI labels, vm-spec, libvirt/cloud-init renderers, cutover-policy, strict-policy, disposable, ovmf, local-infra, skill maintenance, and the agents/workflows/teams guide. Ships five agents — enforcers root-cause-analyzer, layer-validator, testing-validator plus check-bed-runner and deploy-verifier (executors that drive charly check beds) — and the github MCP server.
